title: DLSSync manifest
description: Catalog of upscaler / frame-generation / reflex / DirectStorage DLLs consumed by https://github.com/xt0n1-t3ch/DLSSync. Source of truth for the manifest builder lives in crates/manifest-builder of the DLSSync repo. Do not hand-edit; CI rebuilds hourly from upstream sources.

schema_version.description: Bump only when consumers (dll-catalog crate) require a coordinated migration.

anticheat.description: Optional anti-cheat dataset distilled from AreWeAntiCheatYet, keyed by Steam appid (decimal string) and by normalized game name (lowercase, alphanumeric only). Consumed by the DLSSync detection resolver as the manifest layer; merged with the embedded snapshot and the opt-in live refresh.

anti_tamper.description: Anti-tamper / heavy DRM engines (Denuvo, Arxan, VMProtect). May be empty.

status.description: AreWeAntiCheatYet status (e.g. Supported, Broken, Denied, Planned). Optional.

latest.description: Version string of the release the app should default to (must appear in releases[].version).

version_packed.description: 16-bit-per-component packed u64 (major<<48 | minor<<32 | build<<16 | patch). Used for ordering.

oneOf.description: SHA-256 of the DLL bytes (post-extraction from upstream zip).
MD5 fallback for entries sourced from beeradmoore/dlss-swapper, which only ships MD5.

source.description: Upstream identifier. URL for GitHub releases, 'nuget:pkg@ver' for NuGet, 'beeradmoore/dlss-swapper' for community archive.

cdn_url.description: Direct download URL. Points to upstream GitHub release asset or NuGet flat-container. The manifest repo itself does NOT mirror DLL artifacts.

signature_subject.description: Authenticode subject expected at install time. NVIDIA Corporation / Intel Corporation / Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. / Microsoft Corporation.

min_driver.description: Minimum GPU driver version where this release is known good. Null = no constraint.

hash_algorithm.description: Algorithm the sha256 field carries: sha256 for GitHub/NuGet sources, md5 for beeradmoore/dlss-swapper entries.

zip_entry.description: Exact path of the wanted DLL inside a multi-copy SDK zip (e.g. bin/x64/sl.dlss_g.dll). Disambiguates the signed production binary from the development copy that shares the same filename. Null = match by basename.
